race.comment: ILIAD (10) is a distance specialist who finished fifth two runs back at Werribee then improved last time out to score by a nose after being in the firing line on the turn over 1300m at Wangaratta. Finds a suitable race and can play a major role again. MR CHARISMATIC (3) only had a light prep last campaign but has trialled up nicely ahead of the return and he is a previous first-up winner. VORES (9) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing sixth at Ararat over 1300m, but was a good second in a stronger race than this first-up, so deserves another chance. WALLABY JACK (15) justified long-odds support to score last start, which was on this course, so he obviously likes the place.
